description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Rewrite the ZavaPayGateway application from Apache Struts 1.3.10 to Spring Boot 3.x targeting Java 21, placing the modernized application in a new directory within the repository.
tasks.reason: Apache Struts 1.3.10 is end-of-life with known security vulnerabilities and no cloud-native support. Migrating to Spring Boot 3.x with Java 21 provides a modern, maintainable, and cloud-ready foundation compatible with Azure Container Apps deployment.
tasks.requirements: Rewrite all Struts Actions (LoginAction, PaymentAction, PaymentHistoryAction, HealthAction), ActionForms (LoginForm, PaymentForm), and struts-config.xml routing into Spring Boot 3.x equivalents using Spring MVC. Migrate from WAR packaging with an external Tomcat container to a Spring Boot executable JAR with an embedded server. Migrate javax.* imports to jakarta.* as required by Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 10. Preserve all existing business logic: SSO session resolution, payment processing via ZavaLedger HTTP API, payment history queries, and the health endpoint. The modernized application must be written into a new directory (e.g., modernized/) and must not modify the original Struts source. Target Java 21 with Spring Boot 3.x (latest 3.x release). Use Gradle as the build tool. Note: Spring Boot 4.x requires Java 25 and is incompatible with the requested Java 21 target; Spring Boot 3.x is used. If Java 25 / Spring Boot 4.x is preferred, confirm with the user before proceeding.

tasks.description: Scan all project dependencies in the modernized Spring Boot application for known CVEs and remediate identified vulnerabilities.
tasks.reason: The original project uses Apache Struts 1.3.10 and other outdated dependencies with known CVEs. After rewriting to Spring Boot, a full CVE scan ensures the modernized application has no remaining security vulnerabilities before deployment.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade vulnerable dependencies to the minimum patched version. If a CVE fix requires a major version upgrade, document the affected dependency, the current version, the upgraded major version, and the breaking change risk. Verify that the project builds and all tests pass after remediation.

tasks.description: Containerize the modernized Spring Boot application and deploy it to Azure Container Apps.
tasks.reason: The modernization goal includes deploying the ZavaPayGateway to Azure. Azure Container Apps provides a fully managed serverless container platform suited for Spring Boot microservices.
tasks.requirements: Build a container image for the Spring Boot executable JAR produced by the upgrade task. Provision a new Azure Container Apps environment and deploy the containerized application. Use Azure CLI for all provisioning and deployment steps. Use Bicep for infrastructure as code. Configure the container with the required environment variables (DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, SSO_COOKIE_NAME, AUTH_GATEWAY_WHOAMI_URL, LEDGER_URL, LEDGER_SETTLEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID). Expose port 8080.
tasks.resourceStatus: Create new Azure Container Apps environment and application
